name: education_emergency_exemption_proposed_harbor_lib_eq
premise: A Education district emergency desk is in a fast-moving incident involving education emergency exemption proposed harbor lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases student safety, continuity, and fairness. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Ansel Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Ansel Kowalski, accountable for a defensible call in Education when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Arjun Mensah
agents.identity: I am Arjun Mensah, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Education.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Ansel Kowalski must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Ansel Kowalski do?
